goal: Mount a guarded read-only cockpit route that serves BPK-018 static cockpit HTML without runtime execution, writes, provider calls, database calls, GitHub calls, live AICOS calls, package changes, or deployment changes. The route must be default-off behind BLUEPILOT_COCKPIT_READ_ONLY_ROUTE_ENABLED=true.
scope_out: Do not add runtime execution, provider calls, DB calls, GitHub calls, live AICOS calls, writes, package changes, workflow changes, or deployment changes.
Do not change BPK-018 renderer semantics.
Do not make cockpit actions executable.
claims: The read-only cockpit renderer can be safely mounted behind a default-off route.
The route returns static HTML only and keeps all actions disabled.
The route accepts POSTed cockpit models only when their minimal shape is valid.
The route can be visually checked through a local browser without committing generated artifacts.
assumptions: Operators may use the GET sample preview before a live cockpit model source exists.
A later block may connect real cockpit model production to this route.
The route is not an authorization layer and stays behind an explicit environment gate.
dod: builder/src/cockpitReadOnlyRoute.ts implements a default-off handler for /cockpit/read-only.
The handler returns 403 when disabled, 405 for unsupported methods, 400 for invalid posted models, and text/html for valid GET/POST.
builder/tests/cockpitReadOnlyRoute.test.ts covers disabled, GET sample, POST valid model, invalid model, and method guard.
A local browser screenshot verifies the mounted route renders nonblank read-only cockpit HTML.
review-packets/BPK-021.md records scope, safety invariants, gates, and verification.
The focused route test and npm run typecheck in builder/ pass.
stop_conditions: Runtime execution, provider calls, DB calls, GitHub calls, live AICOS calls, writes, package changes, deployment changes, or executable cockpit actions become necessary.
Changing BPK-018 renderer behavior becomes necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-018 added a static read-only cockpit HTML renderer. BPK-021 may mount it behind a default-off route and verify the rendered surface visually.
